image.used_in: Exact Methods slide — Branch-and-Bound search tree
image.license_note: Third-party academic illustration (Cornell CTOM wiki). Native mode recreates an equivalent, on-brand diagram in-house instead of embedding it directly.

image.used_in: Route Improvers slide — 2-opt edge-swap illustration (one of the three local-search operator panels)
image.license_note: Third-party cached thumbnail of unknown original source/license. Native mode recreates an equivalent, on-brand diagram in-house instead of embedding it directly.
Third-party MDPI conference-proceedings figure. Native mode recreates an equivalent, on-brand diagram in-house instead of embedding it directly.

image.used_in: VRPP slide — problem illustration (profit-based node selection: available / not-yet-available / available-after-rule bins)
image.license_note: Third-party ResearchGate figure. Native mode falls back to the locally stored copy under logic/gen/images/vrpp_illustration_source.png instead of re-fetching it.
